name: Mandarin Hot and Sour Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak and shred the wood ears and square bean curd, if using.
2. Bring soup stock to a boil, add shredded pork, black mushrooms, and wood ears (if used). Cook for 2-3 minutes.
3. Add remaining ingredients and seasonings (except cornstarch, eggs, and green onion), reduce heat and simmer for 2 minutes.
4. Thicken the soup with cornstarch and turn off the heat.
5. Slowly pour in beaten eggs in a thin stream while stirring.
6. Garnish with chopped green onions.
7. If preparing ahead of time, do not add cornstarch and eggs until serving to prevent overcooking. Adjust hotness with varying amounts of white pepper and sourness with different amounts of vinegar.
